title: 50 X 2oz Sauce Pots with Hinged Lids Round Food Containers Deli Pots SauceTubs
features: High quality clear plastic 2 oz plastic food containers with attached lids made of strong, durable, fine grade materials. The hinged lids make these deli pots the most convenient reusable containers for dressings like ketchup, mayo, and ranch!

These reusable containers can also be used for storing food samples, keeping cosmetics, and for storing pills!! Our 2oz hinged plastic cups are strong and are easy to close and open while also being leak-resistant and made of food grade safe polypropylene plastic.

These plastic sauce cups are BPA free and microwave safe so you won’t need to worry about harmful chemicals leaching into foods or the disposable cups with lids warping when microwaved. These reusable shot glasses are sturdy enough to be used again and again! Simply rinse small plastic cups out with soap and warm water and allow to air dry (not dishwasher safe).
description: 50 X 2oz Sauce Pots with Hinged Lids Round Food Containers Deli Pots SauceTubs
